description:
TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#103-115) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2 (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#106)
	- scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#111)
markdown:
[TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L103-L115) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L106)
	- [scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L111)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#663-684) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#682)
	- usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#683)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L663-L684) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L682)
	- [usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L683)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#707-753) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- averageDiff = targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#748)
	- taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#751)
	- targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights() (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#732-734)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L707-L753) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [averageDiff = targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L748)
	- [taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L751)
	- [targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights()](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L732-L734)
